description: Missing race category — the demographics table omits the 'Asian' category from the race variable breakdown. This is a TFL specification compliance error.

TC-002.note: NOTE: The ADSL has 4 race categories (White, Black, Asian, Other) but only 3 appear in the table. Asian category (5+15 subjects) omitted.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: All ADaM variable categories must appear in TFL output
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag missing category: RACE=Asian is present in ADSL (20 subjects) but omitted from demographics table

metadata.notes: Common error when category has small N and programmer accidentally filters it out. But FDA/ICH requires all categories.
